data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Verified 3-file diff: beat-form.tsx removes early clearDraft/setBlocks/setBlockedBy from handleCreateMoreClick; create-beat-dialog.tsx adds clearDraft() in submitBeat success callback before setFormKey remount; new test file locks callback ordering and title autofocus. All 5 acceptance criteria satisfied: fields clear on success, preserved on failure, focus returns to title. Quality gates pass (tsc, tests, build). No security issues or regressions.
